description: Coverage-aware manager/fund overlap comparing a subject plan against peers for one period.
sql: SELECT plan_id, plan_period, manager_name, fund_name, exposure_usd, disclosure_state FROM manager_fund_positions WHERE plan_period = :plan_period ORDER BY manager_name, fund_name, plan_id;
assumptions: disclosure_state is one of disclosed, not_disclosed, known_not_invested
known_not_invested means explicit zero and is distinct from not_disclosed unknowns
